confidence.reason: input_bound is the only bottleneck above threshold.

actions: Benchmark num_workers at 4, 8, and 16 (relative to available CPU cores).
Start with num_workers = cpu_count // 2 and tune from there.
Watch for step-time variance and CPU memory pressure as workers increase.
risks: Too many workers can cause CPU contention or excessive RAM pressure.
On machines with few cores, gains plateau quickly.
recommendations.title: Increase DataLoader workers
validation: GPU active fraction should rise after increasing workers.
DataLoader wait fraction should drop below 0.10.
recommendations.why: GPU activity is low while more than 40% of step time is spent waiting for the DataLoader. The input pipeline is severely starving the device.

actions: Profile __getitem__ to identify expensive per-sample operations.
Pre-compute or cache expensive transforms (resizing, tokenizing, decoding).
Consider offline preprocessing and caching to disk or memory.
risks: Offline caching trades storage for compute — ensure disk I/O is not the new bottleneck.
recommendations.title: Move CPU-heavy transforms off the critical path
validation: DataLoader wait fraction should drop significantly.
recommendations.why: GPU activity is low while more than 40% of step time is spent waiting for the DataLoader. The input pipeline is severely starving the device.

actions: Set pin_memory=True in DataLoader constructor.
Verify the host has enough page-locked memory available.
risks: Pinned memory is limited; too many workers with pin_memory can exhaust it.
recommendations.title: Enable pinned memory for DataLoader
validation: H2D copy time should decrease after enabling pin_memory.
GPU active fraction should improve slightly.
recommendations.why: GPU activity is low while more than 40% of step time is spent waiting for the DataLoader. The input pipeline is severely starving the device.

actions: Set prefetch_factor=2 or 4 (requires num_workers > 0).
Monitor RAM usage — prefetching increases memory held in worker queues.
recommendations.title: Increase DataLoader prefetch factor
validation: Batch-ready gaps between steps should shrink.
recommendations.why: GPU activity is low while more than 40% of step time is spent waiting for the DataLoader. The input pipeline is severely starving the device.

why: Run summary dominant stall type is input_bound.
